vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The biome is in a state of critical failure. The registry (P1-P4) is largely unsupported by visual evidence of living botanical specimens.

inventory_reconciliation.P1 (Yellow Pot): Systemic Loss. No visible plant matter; soil appears barren.
inventory_reconciliation.P2 (Black Pot): Systemic Loss. No visible plant matter; soil appears barren.
inventory_reconciliation.P3 (Black Pot): Systemic Loss. The white rabbit anchor is present, but the Pothos is absent/non-viable.
inventory_reconciliation.P4 (Silver Guest): Systemic Loss. No visible plant matter.

plant_audit.P1: Empty soil surface, no signs of String of Nickels.
plant_audit.P2: Empty soil surface, no signs of Mexican Mint.
plant_audit.P3: White rabbit anchor present, but no Pothos foliage detected.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Consistently dark and damp-appearing across all pots; no surface cracking.
biome_observations.debris: Presence of white, fragmented material (likely crushed eggshells) in the P3 pot area.
biome_observations.desk_surface: A cylindrical object (likely a bottle or container) is present in the vicinity of the pots, shifting position slightly between frames.

vision_report.temporal_deltas: Over the 5-day sequence, there is zero evidence of growth or recovery. The pots remain static, empty containers. The only change is the minor displacement of the external object (bottle) and the consistent absence of biological activity.
vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently non-functional. All registered plants are either dead, removed, or failed to germinate. The environment is currently a 'dead' setup.
anomalies: Presence of white, granular debris (eggshells) in P3.
Unidentified cylindrical object (bottle) introduced to the desk space.
Complete absence of expected botanical specimens.
vision_report.narrative_description: I have performed a meticulous audit of the provided image sequence. My first action was to map the physical pots against the provided registry. Upon validation, I confirmed that all four registered plants (P1-P4) are absent. The pots contain only soil and, in the case of P3, some inert debris. There is no evidence of photosynthesis, leaf development, or plant structure. The biome is currently in a state of total systemic loss.
